# orm-public-freeze-objects

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the freezeObjects mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.freezeObjects({ input: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run freezeObjects

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.freezeObjects({ input: '<value>' }).execute();
```
